67082.name: Mine Bottom
67082.description: Gravel covers the bottom of the mine shaft, remains of the debris the goblins have removed. A small tunnel leads west. Above the faraway din of mining goblins you can hear your own breath in your ears. Dull gray tin flecks are scattered through the stone.

67083.name: Tunnel
67083.description: The tunnel lets off abruptly about fifteen feet away from the mine shaft. The rock is loose and porous here, and rubble to the west indicates a collapse. You see a small fissure to the south, and the tunnel leads back east.

67084.name: Natural Tunnel
67084.description: The tunnel lets off abruptly about fifteen feet away from the mine shaft. The rock is loose and porous here, and rubble to the west indicates a collapse. You see a small fissure to the south, and the tunnel leads back east.

67085.name: Natural Tunnel
67085.description: Granite and quartz form ripples along the sides and roof of the tunnel, which twists and winds through the mountain. At one point you are forced to crawl through a particularly low overhang. The tunnel leads east and up.

67097.name: Pool Bottom
67097.description: A thin deposit of silt covers the bottom, softly blanketing the various rocks that have fallen in. The waters are chill and completely without life, as the ooze has eradicated any organisms a long time ago.

67081.name: Mine Shaft
67081.description: You feel the top and sides of the mountain pressing against you. Is it your imagination, or is the mine shaft less wide than you had first thought? The ladder leads upward and down to the mine bottom.

67086.name: Large Cavern
67086.description: The internal moisture of the mountain has condensed upon the ceiling here, dripping down to form stalactites and stalagmites gradually through the ages. Goblin bones litter the area, and your nostrils catch a whiff of danger. A tunnel blocked by boulders leads north and a hole leads down. Dull gray tin flecks are scattered through the stone.

67087.name: Tunnel
67087.description: Supported by wooden beams harvested from the surrounding forests, this tunnel is strewn with recently mined debris. From the west you can hear the careful tapping of goblin miners. An opening leads south and the mine shaft lies to the east. The southern tunnel has been covered with boulders. A narrow seam of copper glints from the rock face.

67089.name: Slope
67089.description: Following a vein of coppery ore, the goblins have snaked their way through the mountain. The tunnel ends here, where it seems work is still in progress.

67095.name: Fissure Bottom
67095.description: The fissure isn't very wide, and at some points, you would be wedged in between the walls. You could probably make your way south, however, in the direction where a skull has been mounted on a stick driven into the ground.

67096.name: By an Underground Pool
67096.description: Inky waters form a flat, placid surface across the rough stone. A stone cast into the center disappears with a deep *ploop*, but other than that, you get no indication of its depth.

67088.name: Tunnel
67088.description: Following a vein of coppery ore, the goblins have snaked their way through the mountain. The tunnel ends here, where it seems work is still in progress. A cluster of mushrooms glows with an eerie red light, pulsing faintly.

67080.name: Mine Shaft
67080.description: A large tunnel has been carved out at this level, running east and west. The mine shaft continues to descend.

67090.name: Side Tunnel
67090.description: A tunnel leads away from the mine shaft, heading west and down. The floor is littered with small rocks and the occasional bit of ore. You hear tapping coming from the west.

67091.name: Side Tunnel
67091.description: A tunnel cuts across the downward angle of the mine shaft, heading east through the mountain rock. On the way, you see discarded lanterns, a broken pick or two, and a bit of wooden beam.

67092.name: Side Tunnel
67092.description: In the damp, chilly darkness, you hear the tapping of miners from all around. Sometimes you catch an odd phrase as one goblin speaks to another, but the sounds are disjointed and faraway. The tunnel leads west and north.

67093.name: Side Tunnel
67093.description: The tunnel meets an internal fissure here, running to the edge and then moving away to the north. Peering down, you cannot see the bottom, but a stone thrown over the edge assures you that it's not far.

67094.name: Side Tunnel
67094.description: A few small garnets lie here amidst the rubble. The tunnel ends here but continues south.

67079.name: Mine Shaft
67079.description: The mine shaft leads down into the heart of the mountain. Sometimes, the occasional small rock tumbles down from above and seconds pass until you hear it strike bottom below. You hear the tapping of hammers and the chink of shattering rock.

67076.name: Mine Shaft
67076.description: A rough, wooden ladder leads down the shaft, which is wide enough to allow a system of pulleys to bring up rubble and debris. A small tunnel branches off and goes east. A narrow seam of copper glints from the rock face.

67077.name: Side Tunnel
67077.description: This tunnel leads from the main shaft to a small room to the north. Torches upon the walls gutter and flare, casting shifting, horrific shadows upon the rock.

67078.name: Treasure Vault
67078.description: Recently mined chunks of copper ore and garnets of all sizes litter the floor of this room. Though not a great treasure, the contents of this room ensure the prosperity of the Dagaar tribe for months to come.

67067.name: Smooth Room
67067.description: The walls of this room glitter with a cold, glassy substance, as if the rock were melted away. The ceiling is dome-shaped, and in the center of the room you see a smaller, glowing dome. Fiery runes encircle the perimeter of the chamber.

67072.name: Damp Passageway
67072.description: It looks and smells like your typical dungeon. That's not saying much, either. Cells sit to either side.

67073.name: Cell
67073.description: The southern wall of this cell has been chipped away, forming a much larger chamber. A mine shaft descends down into darkness, and you can hear faint tapping far below. Pulleys supporting large chains allow the goblins to extract large amounts of earth.

67074.name: Damp Passageway
67074.description: The passageway branches here, probably leading to more cells. The goblins, however, are in the process of filling these with debris. A bright room lies to the east, and the passage continues west.

67075.name: Lower Laboratory
67075.description: A large table with rusted manacles sits in the center of this whitewashed room. Glowing globes suffuse the area with a hard, brilliant light. Various pieces of rusted machinery line the walls, their purpose forgotten. The goblins have since molded this room to their own purposes, turning it into an interrogation chamber.

67066.name: Guard Room
67066.description: The odors of stale beer, rotting food and poor sanitation mix with the more subtle scents of fear and blood. Various cudgels and clubs lie here, as well as pick axes, lanterns and chisels. A door leads east to the dungeons, and a stairway leads up. A heavy door bars the stairway as it continues down.

67068.name: Cell
67068.description: Cramped and foul, this cell has its share of rats and lice. Wan, red light from the torches outside shines through a tiny grille in the door.

67069.name: Damp Corridor
67069.description: Smoky torches gutter down this passageway filling it with a murky haze. Lined with cell doors, it leads east to the guard room and west to more cells.

67070.name: Cell
67070.description: Similar to size and design of all other dungeon cells you have seen or have had word, the effect works to dampen your soul and drain you of courage. Shadows cover the walls, which seem to close in on you. Chains of a still glinting metal lie in the center of the room.

67071.name: Cell
67071.description: Cramped and foul, this cell has its share of rats and lice. Wan, red light from the torches outside shines through a tiny grille in the door.

67065.name: Spiral Staircase
67065.description: The smell from an enclosed, underground area filled with goblins wafts up in nearly palpable waves. The stairway continues its descent around the tower walls.

67005.name: Chasm Bottom
67005.description: The chasm bottom is as flat and smooth as the walls. A dark canopy of vaporish substance floats about twenty feet from the ground, glowing with a sullen brown light. Littered with the bones of the fallen, you cannot find any way out from this place.

67064.name: Spiral Staircase
67064.description: The air feels decidedly damp and chilly. An occasional globe lights the gloom, but you cannot see more than a few feet in front of you. The stairway spirals around the tower interior, wrapping around manacled skeletons dangling in the center.

527.name: Summoning Chamber
527.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

67098.name: Corridor
67098.description: Built on a grand scale, the sheer immensity of this place manifests itself in even the corridors, which are broad enough for five men and higher than two. Brackets in the form of claws house crystal globes, some glowing and some defunct. The way lies to the east and west.

568.name: Summoning Chamber
568.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

601.name: Summoning Chamber
601.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

636.name: Summoning Chamber
636.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

157.name: Summoning Chamber
157.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

669.name: Summoning Chamber
669.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

179.name: Summoning Chamber
179.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

704.name: Summoning Chamber
704.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

208.name: Summoning Chamber
208.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

737.name: Summoning Chamber
737.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

233.name: Summoning Chamber
233.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

774.name: Summoning Chamber
774.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

264.name: Summoning Chamber
264.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

808.name: Summoning Chamber
808.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

479.name: Summoning Chamber
479.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

367.name: Summoning Chamber
367.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

424.name: Summoning Chamber
424.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

67000.name: Courtyard
67000.description: Centuries ago, a great battle raged here as the forces of Ilarien cut a swath of destruction through Alestar's armies of undead. It is said that while the armies clashed, Ilarien went on alone through the inner gate and challenged the then Emperor of the World to a final duel. You would not think that such grand events occurred here amidst this fly-infested slumhole.

67001.name: Rocky Trail
67001.description: A thin, rocky trail winds its way up through the rocks on the mountain. It switches back on itself with sharp, sudden turns, sometimes sloping as much as sixty degrees. The bones crunch brittly beneath your feet, like dry sticks. Below, a thick, unnatural fog covers the trail.

67002.name: Rocky Trail
67002.description: Miserable shrubs cling precariously to the mountainous terrain. The trail leads steeply back and forth, and far far above you can see a grim fortress squatting on the summit like a hideous bird of prey.

67003.name: Rocky Trail
67003.description: A level area, perhaps large enough for ten men to stand comfortably, marks the end of the upward trail. An immense chasm yawns to the immediate east, spanned by a bridge of single but massive stones. A monument sits by the causeway hung with various skulls.

67004.name: Causeway
67004.description: Wind shrieks ominously around the causeway as currents from the chasm and mountaintop clash. The fortress of Torm Sarvek looms to the east, its sharp angles cutting a fearsomely majestic silhouette against the sky. Looking down, you can see no bottom.

e.to_room_name: At the Gates of Torm Sarvek

67007.name: At the Gates of Torm Sarvek
67007.description: You are struck by the massive size of this place, its austere lines and its stark facades. The gates have long been shattered by some great force, but the archway rises high above you, large enough to allow giants easy passage. You can detect a strong odor coming from within.

67008.name: Broken Fountain
67008.description: A dragon pours a torrent of water from its sinuous throat. In better days it must have kept a small army supplied, but now the water appears greenish and oily. Small flecks of white foam float on the top, leaving a slime-coated tideline around the fountain walls.

67009.name: Courtyard
67009.description: Piles of garbage lay against the outer walls, rotting and stinking with an odor almost visible in their repugnance. Flies swarm everywhere, so numerous their buzzing creates a roar. The shattered gate lies to the west and a broken fountain to the north. The towers of Torm Sarvek rear up against the eastern sky.

w.to_room_name: At the Gates of Torm Sarvek

67012.name: Guard Room
67012.description: Most of the southern wall has been blasted away by some explosion. Chunks of masonry litter the marble floor, converted now to makeshift tables. Clubs and cudgels lie piled in a corner, along with leather jerkins that look like they could move on their own. A staircase winds up to the fortress tower, and archways lead to the east and south. The twisted remains of a chandelier hang from the ceiling.

67013.name: Foyer
67013.description: Built by the mad mage Alestar, Torm Sarvek now houses the tribe of Dagaar. Large archways lead north, south and east. The entrance lies to the west, and a barricade of rubble and wood blocks a stairway to the second floor. Even after all these years, the fortress still wears a sense of immensity and grandeur-- despite the garbage littering the floor and the squalid odor permeating the halls.

67014.name: Guard Room
67014.description: Probably once a sitting room, it now serves as a guard station. A mouldering carpet breathes clouds of dust, and a vaulted ceiling supports two chandeliers now blackened with grime and age. Skulls of various foes hang from them like mobiles, swaying softly with the air currents. Archways lead north and east, and a staircase climbs up and down.

67015.name: Living Area
67015.description: Ancient tapestries hang in shreds upon the high stone walls, and tarnished sconces hold sometimes still glowing globes. Grand archways lead west and east, patterned with dragons and gargoyles. In the midst of this ruined splendor, the tribe of Dagaar sleeps, eats, mates, and dies.

67016.name: Long Corridor
67016.description: Supported by smooth, round pillars, many now cracked, this corridor runs east and west from the foyer to an intersection. Scarred and knicked bas reliefs cover the walls, and globes affixed to the walls with iron claws glow with a nacreous light. This passage must have been an imposing sight indeed to an approaching prisoner. Now it is filled with trash.

67017.name: Living Area
67017.description: A great painting covers the southern wall, filmed with soot and cracked with age. Huddled forms of goblins sprawl upon the ground where once the mighty Alestar ruled. A fetid odor wafts through the room, its source everywhere about you. Archways lead to the north and east.

67018.name: Ruined Garden
67018.description: Choked now with weeds, you can guess that Alestar's garden was laid out in carefully ordered areas. At least, the bricks of the path seem to indicate fairly square boundaries. You recognize some remaining herbs, but by far the largest patch seems to be overrun by poisonous plants.

67019.name: Corridor
67019.description: A corridor runs across the northern part of the fortress, running east to west and branching south. A door creaking back and forth on rusted hinges leads out to an overgrown garden. The dim illumination produced from cracked globes on the walls does little to chase away the shadows.

67020.name: Corridor
67020.description: Dust-covered tiles cover the floor, all a continuous shade of iron grey. Cold, stately pillars of the same stone stand in even intervals, sometimes alternating with crumbling statues. You see an intersection to the south, and the smell of unwashed bodies and open refuse assails you from the north.

67021.name: Intersection
67021.description: Four archways lead to the north, south, east and west. The rest of the walls are bare and grim, lit sporadically by cracked globes. Pieces of food litter the floor, slowly putrifying with age.

67022.name: Corridor
67022.description: A corridor of iron grey stone stretches out to the north and south. Covered now with dust and strewn with garbage, you can almost imagine how it would have looked long ago, in the height of Alestar's power, how the very walls seemed to rise up and belittle you with their geometry.

67023.name: Corridor
67023.description: A corridor runs from a large room to the west, branching north or heading east. The stench of refuse, urine and sweat roils from the western direction, apparently a common living area for the goblins.

67024.name: Corridor
67024.description: Rats squeak and scurry into the shadows. You see rat bones and half eaten carcasses against the wall, left to rot where they lie. The corridor runs from the east to west.

67025.name: Receiving Area
67025.description: Ancient stone benches line the walls of this oval-shaped room, some with iron rings fastened into the granite behind them. A draft blows in from somewhere, making it uncomfortably chilly. Grinning skulls, humanoid and distinctly goblin, decorate the border between the ceiling and the walls, apparently a newer addition.

67026.name: Corridor
67026.description: Running along the southern wall of Alestar's fortress, this passageway reeks of goblins. A cold draft blows from west to east, and the walls are bathed in perpetual shadow.

67027.name: Great Hall
67027.description: Stately pillars rise up to support a ceiling fallen away to reveal the sky above. Rubble and debris cover the tiled marble floor, and enormous flying buttresses reach across the open sky like the ribs of a decayed corpse. The goblins have draped the walls and rest of the ceiling with soiled silks of red and orange and gold.

67028.name: Small Room
67028.description: Looks like the goblins use this room as a supply dump. You see several casks of foul beer, a few jugs of wine, mealy flour, and dried beef. Roaches scurry over the ground at your feet, and you can hear the occasional rat squeaking. Doorways lead north and south. You aren't very hungry.

67029.name: Guard Room
67029.description: Torches burn redly here, tied to the claw-shaped brackets on the walls, some of which still hold cracked globes. A stairway leads up to the second level, but has been barricaded and blocked off.

67030.name: Private Dining Room
67030.description: A long trestle table sits in the middle of this room, laden with the remains of a large meal. Tarnished and mismatched silverware lies scattered over the surface, and a plate of gnawed bones still serves as the centerpiece. A blocked off stairway leads up to the second floor, and a doorway leads east to the great hall.

67031.name: Before the Throne
67031.description: A massive throne sits upon an ebony dias, covered with garish red pillows and backed by a copper panel carved to resemble flames. Behold the hall of ruined splendor! Even tawdry and gutted, its interior gilt and its ribs exposed to the elements, you feel a sense of weight pressing downward, of power vast as the universe, as elemental as the earth itself. A large blackened area lies about 20 feet from the throne and a little to its left.

67056.name: Summoning Chamber
67056.description: You find yourself within the center of a perfectly circular chamber, lit by an unseen source. All angles within have been rounded off, so that the walls seem to flow into the floor and ceiling. A thin groove spirals out from the center, and you can discern the faint lines of a pentagram before you.

67010.name: On the Staircase
67010.description: The goblins have carefully boarded over the staircase as it rises through the ceiling. A trapdoor sits in the center, with two sets of bolts on either side making it as secure as possible. On one of the outer edges, you see a large keyhole.

67011.name: On the Staircase
67011.description: The goblins have boarded over this staircase as it passes through the floor of the second level.

67032.name: The Throne of Alestar
67032.description: You behold an immense throne carved from a single block of obsidian. Skulls dipped in copper dangle from the corners and a few filthy pillows cover the seat. The throne appears solidly, sternly immovable, despite its showy trappings.

67037.name: Sitting Room
67037.description: Filled with coffee tables and plush chairs in various states of decay, this room adjoins the library and once offered a comfortable reading area. Surprisingly, the second floor of this fortress seems a lot more liveable than the grim first. A stairway leads up and doorways lead to the east and south. The stairway also continues down, but has been boarded over quite carefully.

67038.name: Library
67038.description: Dusty books line the walls and lay scattered over the western portion of the room, where the shelf has collapsed from age. The pages lay cracked and yellowed, and crumble to dust at the slightest touch. Such a wealth of information, all lost, like an unsaved file remaining on screen after the crash...

67039.name: Scrying Room
67039.description: A round pool rests in the middle of the room, contained in a well of obsidian. The surface is covered with dust, but looking in briefly, you can still sense its power. You wonder what magic has kept it from evaporating all this time. A doorway leads back south.

67040.name: Balustrade
67040.description: A marble balustrade runs the length of the balcony overlooking the foyer. Constructed from the same grey stone as the rest of the fortress, it seems to blend in with its surroundings. A finger run along the top comes away black with dust. The balustrade runs north and south, and diamond rods line the walls.

67041.name: Cold Hallway
67041.description: A long, cold hallway constructed of iron grey stone extends to the east and ends in a balustrade to the west. The stone is exposed except for a threadbare carpet housing centuries of dust. Diamond rods along the walls illuminate the way with a cold light. The library lies to the north.

67042.name: Cold Hallway
67042.description: Sometimes you can catch a whiff of the chaos and stench of the rooms below, but for the most part all remains silent and well-ordered. You are surprised to see no rats or roaches here...or skeletons of the same. Rods light the way east and west, and doorways go north and south.

67043.name: Second Floor Landing
67043.description: You find yourself at the end of a long hall, covered with mouldering, dusty carpet and lined with glowing rods of diamond. At your feet are several boards covering a staircase leading to the first floor. The staircase continues winding up around the northeast tower.

67048.name: Second Floor Landing
67048.description: The stairs curve down in a graceful arc, wide and shallow. About halfway down, the goblins have erected a barricade of broken furniture, rubble, and rough-hewn wooden planks. The balustrade leads north and south. Diamond rods line the upper walls.

67049.name: Collection Room
67049.description: This long, rectangular room houses a myriad of grisly curios. Over here you see the remains of a mummified baby dragon, over there a collection of preserved heads sitting in individual jars. Treasures from around the world sparkle upon the walls, and various weapons are displayed on glittering racks.

67050.name: Cold Hallway
67050.description: A carved balustrade overlooks the foyer. Diamond rods illuminate the grey stone below in a singularly bleak light. Piles of garbage send up a pungent odor, and you can hear the buzzing of flies. To the south is a sitting room, to the east a hallway, and to the north, a stairway leading down.

67051.name: Cold Hallway
67051.description: Small bones litter the hallway, probably goblin in origin. The diamond rods emit a steady light, entrapping shadows upon the vaulted ceiling. You resist the urge to sneeze from centuries of dust. The hallway continues east and ends at a balustrade to the west. A doorway lies to the south.

67052.name: Cold Hallway
67052.description: The carpet disintegrates at your touch, wafting away in clouds of billowing dust. The light of the diamond rods shines without heat, and it seems unnaturally cold within this passageway. A doorway lies to the south, and the hallway extends to the west and east.

67053.name: Second Floor Landing
67053.description: You look down a long hallway to the west, built of iron grey stone and lighted by rods of glowing diamond. To the north, a balustrade overlooks the vast hall below. You can see the throne and the debris strewn over the floor. You can see the open sky through the ruined and skeletal remains of the dome. A staircase winds up to the southeast tower.

67061.name: Sitting Room
67061.description: An ancient, cracked coffee table sits before a set of matching chairs. The chairs face a window on the eastern wall, and you can see the trail leading up to the fortress. A stairway around the edge of the room climbs up to the southwest tower and is blocked in the downward direction by a trap door. A doorway leads north.

67062.name: Guest Chamber
67062.description: You see the small prints of footsteps within the dust. Fairly recent, relative to everything else. The room is filled with ruined richness. Although stark in his architectural ideas, Alestar was apparently very wealthy.

67063.name: Guest Chamber
67063.description: You look around a well-appointed chamber, spacious and sumptuous in furnishment. Dust covers everything, from the rotting bed to the tarnished silver chandelier. When Alestar had visitors, and he must have, judging from this room, they lived well.

67036.name: Spiral Staircase
67036.description: This staircase winds around the inside of the northwest tower. Dust covers the steps in a soft fuzzy blanket. The grey of the stone provides little visual excitement. Diamond rods are attached to the walls at intervals.

67044.name: Spiral Staircase
67044.description: The stairs climb around and around the inside of the northeast tower. You feel a brooding presence here, and the diamond rods upon the walls do little to alleviate the gloom.

67054.name: Spiral Staircase
67054.description: Your breathing thunders in your ears, and shadows seem to dart around your every movement. The stairway goes down and ends at a door to the east. Diamond rods adorn the walls. You get the distinct feeling of being watched.

67055.name: Laboratory
67055.description: An immense stone table sits in the middle of this chamber, filled with dust covered flasks, alembics and other alchemical equipment. Books and manuals cover the surrounding tables, some lying open and others piled on top of each other. A door lies to the west and a strange symbol covers the floor in the eastern corner. A portal is drawn on the northern wall.

67060.name: Spiral Staircase
67060.description: The staircase winds up and around the southwest tower. Occasional windows let you catch a glimpse of the mountainous terrain below. A doorway stands at the top of the stairs. Diamond rods illuminate the walls.

67035.name: Guard Room
67035.description: At one time, guards must have manned this room, keeping a look out on the land below and raining arrows down upon unwanted trespassers. Now, however, the room is empty, cold, and filled with debris. A small staircase leads up to the tower top, and a large staircase leads down to the fortress below. A single diamond rod hangs suspended from the ceiling.

67045.name: Spiral Staircase
67045.description: You see a door at the staircase top. The stairs end here and continue spiraling down into the main part of the fortress, the diamond rods lighting the way like stars. Shadows seem to gather in the center of the ceiling.

67059.name: Guard Room
67059.description: This circular chamber boasts a large wooden table and rough, wooden stools. Lancet windows in the walls allow you to see how very far from the ground you are. A small stone staircase winds its way up to the tower top, and a larger one leads down to the main fortress. A single rod has been hung from the ceiling.

67034.name: Narrow Staircase
67034.description: A small staircase leads up to the very top of the tower. You can hear the wind occasionally buffet the walls around you. The stone is cold to the touch, and a draft seeps down from the door above.

67046.name: Alestars Chamber
67046.description: Leaded windows look out on the countryside below, and a giant hearth must have heated the entire top of the tower long ago. A few murals of landscapes and stills decorate the walls, often featuring cosmological themes. A brass- railed stairway leads up to the study, and some strange cards are laid out on nightstand.

67058.name: Small Staircase
67058.description: The steps are steep and narrow, making travel somewhat precarious. A chilly draft blows down from above. You see a door at the stairtop.

67033.name: Tower Top Room
67033.description: You find yourself within a round area at the very top of the tower, about twenty feet in diameter. Wind howls through the open bars surrounding you on all sides, making you shiver. From here you can see the eagles soar through the clouds and the overgrown remains of a city below.

67047.name: Study
67047.description: A large, ebon desk sits against the far wall, bare except for a gleaming ink and quill set and a scroll organizer resembling a wine rack. The books are all set neatly on their shelves, and reams of manuscripts lie bound neatly on the floor beside the desk. Everything looks put away. A staircase leads down and a portal is drawn on the southern wall. A large charred area mars the center of the carpet.

67057.name: Tower Top Room
67057.description: Surrounded by dimly glowing bars on all sides, this room is open to the elements. You can look out and get a panoramic view of sky, the mountains, and even a great, desolate battlefield. As a prisoner here, freedom would be just a step away, but infinitely unreachable.
